name: Kenshin Himura

abilities.name: Hiten Mitsurugi-ryu
abilities.description: The pinnacle of swordsmanship, based on predicting and countering an opponent's attacks before they strike. Kenshin is the sole remaining master of this style.
abilities.limit: Requires intense focus; can trigger violent side

abilities.name: Denshū no Tsue
abilities.description: Lightning Staff Technique - a surprise attack using a walking stick as a sword extension. Uses the opponent's momentum against them.

abilities.name: Ryūkōsen
abilities.description: Dragon Drunk Fist - an extremely fast attack that creates multiple blurs. Used as a finishing blow against strong opponents.

abilities.name: Shingetsujin
abilities.description: God Hawk Swift - an attack that strikes the opponent's pressure points in rapid succession, causing paralysis.

abilities.name: Sakabatō Mastery
abilities.description: Masters the reverse-blade sword that cannot kill, allowing non-lethal combat while maintaining lethal skill.

abilities.name: Amaterasu
abilities.description: The ultimate technique - a downward diagonal cut so fast it appears as a single line of light. Used only in desperate situations.
abilities.limit: Extremely draining; reverts to Battousai personality

personality.dream: A world without killing, protect the innocent

character.arc: Kenshin transforms from a deadly assassin (Battousai) to a peaceful wanderer seeking redemption. His journey explores the weight of past violence and the possibility of change. He seeks to protect others without killing, proving that strength can serve peace.
character.motivation: Atone for past killings, protect the innocent without taking life

achievements: Helped bring down the Meiji government's corrupt officials

bounty.details: Formerly hunted; now protected by Meiji government

list: Past trauma can trigger Battousai personality
factors: Can lose control when pushed too far
Refuses to kill even when necessary

notable_battles.method: Used Amaterasu but was severely burned; outlasted Shishio's body

quotes: A sword is a weapon... but swordsmanship is learning how to kill. That is the truth.
I have no interest in men's wars, only in protecting those who cannot fight.
This one prefers Mistress Kaoru's play-talk more than the truth.
I will protect the living, even if it means facing the dead!

voice_acting.note: Mayo Suzukaze is iconic in the role

story.fate: Married Kaoru, had children, continued protecting the Meiji era
story.awakening_potential: Could continue growing as a protector

about:
Age: 28
Birthday: June 20, 1849
Height: 158 cm
Weight: 48 kg

Kenshin Himura, also known throughout the anime as Hitokiri Battousai (Battousai the Manslayer) or Himura the Battousai is the main character of the anime series Rurouni Kenshin.  His original name was Shinta (心太).  His parents died of cholera when he was very young and as a result, was adopted by three slave women in a traveling slave wagon.  Soon after meeting them, bandits had raided the convoy and killed his three new guardians and were about to kill him when a man named Seijuro Hiko killed the bandits. Hiko soon adopted the child and because Shinta was not a name fitted for a swordman, he renamed him Kenshin, meaning "Heart of Sword," took him under his wing and taught him the Hiten Mitsuruugi Ryu.


The next time Kenshin is seen is 10 years later as he has become a wanderer who helps out anyone in need who is suffering right before his eyes.  Those long 10 years have taken him from Kyoto, all over Japan to where we find him in episode one of the anime, in Tokyo, still keeping his vow never to kill again.  It is here where he meets Kaoru Kamiya and his whole life begins to change once again. (See Rurouni Kenshin anime).  

Kenshin is usually depicted as a care-free swordsman who is very aloof and tends to be a bit simple-minded when it comes to living normally.  He is seen to be doing many of the chores around the dojo that he stays at with Kaoru, (i.e., cooking, cleaning, laundry, etc.).  He believes it is his way of repaying Kaoru with allowing him to stay at her dojo. (although it seems he has gotten attracted to kaoru in the end).

However, his swordsmanship ranks among the elite as he is seen defeating every rival (with the exception of Hajime Saitou which ended in a draw).  His battle senses are top-notch and he recognizes even the slightest of advantages, strategies and tactics during a sword battle.  

(Source: Kenshin Wikia)
